meaning: adj.未涂漆的,无装饰的,质朴的,原样的
examples: It was the plain unvarnished truth.
The public expects us to deliver the unvarnished truth.
Its pure, unvarnished truth is told with down-home common sense.
Upstairs in the winery office are two classic wood desks and unvarnished alder floors.
But you owe it your company to deliver the true, unvarnished reasons for terminating an employee.
